title: Chicken Jockifier
description: A Minecraft Movie based data pack that turns adjacent baby zombies and chickens into chicken jockeys
body:
![Chicken Jockifier by mechanira](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33ce51777ee29650a399bb68a84982c258f9beb6.png)

# About
This data pack is inspired by **A Minecraft Movie (2025)** and makes it so any baby zombie can start riding an adjacent chicken, resulting in a chicken jockey! A perfect addition to make your world feel more dynamic and terrifying.

![Chicken Jockifier showcase](https://github.com/mechanira/Chicken-Jockifier/blob/main/assets/chicken%20jockey.gif?raw=true)

# Download
Chicken Jockifier is available for 1.21.4. Download the .zip, and put it in the `datapacks` folder of your world.
